description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style, figure flattering cuts and lean fits in each and every one of its creations. That, and the colour, makes this floral printed dress a must buy for the summer. Wear it with simple flats and understated accessories for a simple and fashionable day out look.Product DetailsYellow floral printed halter dress, has vertical drawstring tie at the centre of the bust from the neckline, elastication at the back for better Fit and tiered pleated detailing at the hemMaterial and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron  Size and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 68 cm from neckline to hem
